# Next.js Project Setup

## Checklist

- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md file created
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Next.js project with TypeScript and modern tooling
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions - No external extensions required
- [x] Compile the Project - Build successful, no errors
- [x] Create and Run Task - Development and build tasks configured
- [x] Launch the Project - Ready for development
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README.md updated

## Project Details
- Type: Next.js with App Router
- Language: TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Linting: ESLint
- Directory: src/
- Framework Version: Next.js 15.5.12
- Node.js: 22.12.0 (LTS)

## Completed Steps

✅ Project structure created with proper directories (src/app, src/components, src/lib, src/styles, public)
✅ Configuration files (next.config.ts, tailwind.config.ts, tsconfig.json, postcss.config.mjs)
✅ App router layout and homepage created
✅ Tailwind CSS globals configured  
✅ ESLint configuration added (.eslintrc.json)
✅ Dependencies installed (React 19, Next.js 15.5.12, TypeScript, Tailwind, ESLint)
✅ Build verified - production build successful with 0 errors
✅ VS Code tasks configured for dev/build/lint
✅ README.md and documentation complete

## Next Steps for Development

To start the development server:
- Press `Ctrl+Shift+B` to run the default task (Next.js Dev Server)
- Or run: `npm run dev`
- Open http://localhost:3000 in your browser

To lint the project:
- Run: `npm run lint`

To build for production:
- Run: `npm run build` followed by `npm start`
